caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" across the chest, and gold jewelry including a watch and necklaces. He wears large over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. To his left is a white backdrop featuring a gold star logo and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE." Above him, a blue banner reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". On the desk in front of him is a black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and slightly angled away from the camera, glancing toward someone off-screen. There is very little movement between the frames, with the man maintaining a consistent posture and facial expression as he listens or prepares to speak.
